primary_analysis.name: target-runtime ECDF and ERT
primary_analysis.problem_reference_value: For each problem, f_ref is the minimum final fbest across all 7 algorithms and 30 paired seeds. This symmetric best-observed reference is defined before reading values.
primary_analysis.runtime: First objective-evaluation index in the improvement history whose best-so-far value is <= f_target.
primary_analysis.failure_cost: The full prescribed problem budget is charged to an unsuccessful run.
primary_analysis.ert: For each problem, algorithm and target: sum(success runtimes + full budgets for failures) / number of successes; ERT is infinite when no run succeeds.
primary_analysis.data_profile_x: Function evaluations divided by problem dimension.
primary_analysis.aggregation_unit: Problem-seed-target triples for ECDF; problem-target blocks for ERT comparison.

secondary_analysis.task_rank: Rank final fbest within each problem-seed block; average ties.
secondary_analysis.problem_summary: Median final normalized gap and mean task rank over 30 seeds.
secondary_analysis.pairwise_counts: BasinGraph better/worse/tied against each baseline on problem-seed final values with a scale-aware tolerance.

confirmatory_statistics.algorithm_score: Per-problem median final normalized gap over 30 seeds.
confirmatory_statistics.post_hoc: Paired two-sided Wilcoxon signed-rank tests comparing BasinGraph with each baseline.
confirmatory_statistics.effect_size: Paired rank-biserial correlation, reported with direction.

stratified_reporting.status: Descriptive ECDF, ERT, final-gap and rank summaries; no separate confirmatory claim because group problem counts are 11, 7 and 6.

interpretation_rules: Primary claims rely on target-runtime ECDF/ERT.
Report the prospective holdout separately from the 50-problem development/comparability set.
Do not modify any algorithm or parameter after this holdout.
Use operational basin-state terminology from the frozen contract.
